exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your reading challenge forward
items: Research and compile a list of 20 books from different genres that align with your reading interests and challenge goals
Visit your local library or bookstore to explore new genres and discover hidden gem books through browsing
Create a personal book wish list by exploring online bookstores and literary award lists to identify titles that spark your curiosity
Set aside time to browse a bookstore or library section you have never explored before to discover unexpected books
Create a personalized book discovery system by setting up alerts and following book recommendation sources across multiple platforms
Set up a dedicated reading space and establish your daily reading routine
